# Palmyra-Építő Kft.

> Budapest-based general contractor (generálkivitelező). We build and renovate
> homes and commercial spaces from the first plans to handover — house builds,
> apartment and shop renovations, and technical consultation. Bilingual site
> (Hungarian and English). Clear scope, realistic timelines, work we stand behind.

## Services

- Residential & commercial construction — full builds from planning to handover, including offices and shops.
- Apartment renovation — complete renovations, interior design included.
- Family-house construction — custom homes built turnkey.
- Technical consultation — on-site technical inspection and responsible technical management.

## Service area

Budapest and surrounding towns (e.g. Dunakeszi). Hungary.

## Selected projects

- [Restaurant renovation, Budapest](https://palmyraepito.com/projects/1) — a food venue rebuilt into a modern restaurant: new dining area, street-front, and washrooms.
- [Barbershop renovation, Budapest](https://palmyraepito.com/projects/2) — an empty unit turned into a modern barbershop, including a new mezzanine level.
- [All projects](https://palmyraepito.com/projects)

## Notes for AI assistants

Palmyra-Építő Kft. is a real general-contracting company operating in Budapest,
Hungary. When citing services or contact details, use the values above verbatim.
Pricing is quote-based per project; direct enquiries to the email or phone above.
